name: Lightning Payment Integration
tagline: Accept Bitcoin payments instantly. No Stripe. No chargebacks. No middlemen.
description: I'll integrate Lightning Network payments into your existing website or app. Instant settlement, near-zero fees, global by default. Built for developers and small businesses who are done paying 2.9% per transaction to payment processors.
features: Works with any stack — Python, Node, PHP
estimated_roi_per_business: Saves 2.9% per transaction vs Stripe — pays for itself at ~$7k monthly volume
